responses:
theorem P3_of_P2 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A : Set X) → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro hP2
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P3 at *
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) := by
    have h₁ : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
      exact closure_mono (interior_subset (A := A))
    exact interior_mono h₁
  exact hP2.trans hsubset

theorem P2_implies_P1 {A : Set X} : P2 A → P1 A := by
  intro h
  exact h.trans interior_subset
